name: ASRock B760 PRO RS/D4 WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-5333+(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASRock B760 PRO RS/D4 WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Mid-range ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 socket with DDR4 support, WiFi 6E, and 2.5G LAN.
